article_meta.title: Tillis: 'Noem Is Out of Her Depth,' She's 'Not Competent' 7 Pam Key28 Jan 2026 Wednesday on CNN's "The Lead," Sen

reasoning: Direction likely correct (Right) and confidence plausible, but the model relies on outlet identity and quoted source language rather than the author's own prose/structural choices. Little evidence from the author’s narration; multiple attribution-rule violations.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: The piece presents only a GOP senator’s criticism and no counterbalance; headline amplifies the critique. Right or Lean Right is appropriate; classifying as Right is within one class of any reasonable ground truth.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Bias signals are clear and one-sided; 0.95 is high but defensible for a strongly slanted aggregation piece.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence cites Breitbart’s reputation and quoted language/stances (sanctuary cities, negative language) rather than the author’s prose; only the absence of opposing perspectives is a valid structural indicator.
